ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
--  TTS Discord 음성채널 이동 모듈
--  사용법:
--    1. HOST_TOKEN 에 발급받은 토큰 입력
--    2. BOT_URL 에 Railway 서버 URL 입력
--    3. 세션 시작 시 DiscordBridge.startSession() 호출
--    4. 이동 시    DiscordBridge.movePlayer(steamId, discordId, targetKey) 호출
--       targetKey: "main" | "private1" | "private2" | "private3" | "private4"
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

DiscordBridge = {}
switchToggle = 0
currentPage = 0
connectClickPColor = nil
HOST_TOKEN = ""
BOT_URL    = "https://hsautomove-production.up.railway.app"

-- 세션 데이터 (startSession 후 채워짐)
sessionData = {
    hostSteamId   = nil,
    hostDiscordId = nil,
    channels      = {},   -- { main, private1, private2, private3, private4 }
    players       = {},   -- [ { discord_id, nickname } ]
}

function connectToDiscord(player, value, id)
    if player.color == 'Grey' then return end
    player.showInputDialog("유저 토큰 입력",
        function (text, player_color)
            if player_color == 'Grey' then
                broadcastToAll('Grey 색상에서는 연동할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            if currentPage == 0 then
                currentPage = 1
                HOST_TOKEN = text
                connectClickPColor = player_color
                DiscordBridge.startSession()
            end
        end
    )
end

-- ── 내부 유틸 ────────────────────────────────────────

function initialization()
    Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', nil)
    self.UI.setAttribute('step1', 'active', 'true')
    self.UI.setAttribute('step2', 'active', 'false')
    currentPage = 0
    switchToggle = 0
    self.UI.setAttribute('switch', 'color', '#FF7777')
    self.UI.setAttribute('switch', 'text', '스위치:OFF')
    sessionData.hostSteamId   = nil
    sessionData.hostDiscordId = nil
    sessionData.channels      = {}   -- { main, private1, private2, private3, private4 }
    sessionData.players       = {}   -- [ { discord_id, nickname } ]
    for i = 1, 10 do 
        self.UI.setValue('steamMember'..tostring(i), '')
        self.UI.setAttribute('steamMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'text', '사용자명 매칭')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'color', '#FFFFFF')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
    end
end

local function postJSON(endpoint, body, callback)
    local url = BOT_URL .. endpoint
    local headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json" }
    WebRequest.custom(url, "POST", true, JSON.encode(body), headers, function(resp)
        if resp.is_error then
            broadcastToAll("[Discord] 요청 오류: " .. resp.error, {r=1,g=0,b=0})
            initialization()
            return
        end
        local ok, data = pcall(JSON.decode, resp.text)
        if not ok then
            broadcastToAll("[Discord] 응답 파싱 오류", {r=1,g=0,b=0})
            initialization()
            return
        end
        if data.error then
            broadcastToAll("[Discord] 서버 오류: " .. data.error, {r=1,g=0.5,b=0})
            initialization()
            return
        end
        callback(data)
    end)
end

-- ── 공개 API ─────────────────────────────────────────

--- 세션 시작 (호스트 인증 + 데이터 수신)
--- 성공 시 onSessionReady(data) 호출됨
function DiscordBridge.startSession()
    postJSON("/auth", { token = HOST_TOKEN }, function(data)
        sessionData.hostSteamId   = data.host_steam_id
        sessionData.hostDiscordId = data.host_discord_id
        sessionData.channels      = data.channels
        sessionData.players       = data.players
        
        if onSessionReady then
            onSessionReady(sessionData)
        else
            Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', nil)
            currentPage = 0
        end
    end)
end

steamIdToDiscordId = {}
discordNameToId = {}
discordNameList = {}
steamIdList = {}
steamNameList = {}

function onSessionReady(sdata)
    steamIdToDiscordId = {}
    discordNameToId = {}
    discordNameList = {}
    steamIdList = {}
    steamNameList = {}
    
    if Player[connectClickPColor].steam_id ~= sessionData.hostSteamId then
        broadcastToAll('올바른 토큰 사용자가 아닙니다.')
        initialization()
        return
    else
        setConsoleVisibility(connectClickPColor)
    end

    for i = 1, 10 do 
        self.UI.setValue('steamMember'..tostring(i), '')
        self.UI.setAttribute('steamMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'text', '사용자명 매칭')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
    end
    -- 호스트 엔트리 제거
    for i = #sdata.players, 1, -1 do
        if sdata.players[i].discord_id == sdata.hostDiscordId then
            table.remove(sdata.players, i)
            break
        end
    end
    
    
    if sdata.hostSteamId == nil or sdata.hostDiscordId == nil or sdata.channels.main == nil or sdata.channels.private1 == nil or sdata.channels.private2 == nil or sdata.channels.private3 == nil or sdata.channels.private4 == nil then
        Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', nil)
        broadcastToAll("연동 실패", {r=1,g=0,b=0})
        if sdata.channels.main == nil then
            broadcastToAll("메인방 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private1 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방1 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private2 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방2 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private3 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방3 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private4 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방4 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        initialization()
        return
    else
        -- broadcastToAll("디스코드와 연동되었습니다. 플레이어 매칭을 완료해 주세요.", {r=0,g=1,b=0})
    end
    -- print(sdata.hostSteamId)
    -- print(sdata.hostDiscordId)
    -- print(sdata.channels.main)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private1)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private2)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private3)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private4)
    for i = #sdata.players, 1, -1 do
        discordNameToId[sdata.players[i].nickname] = sdata.players[i].discord_id
        discordNameList[#discordNameList + 1] = sdata.players[i].nickname
    end
    
    local pls = Player.getPlayers()
    for i = 1, #pls do
        if pls[i].color ~= 'Grey' then
            if pls[i].steam_id == sdata.hostSteamId then
                steamIdToDiscordId[pls[i].steam_id] = sdata.hostDiscordId
            else
                steamNameList[#steamNameList + 1] = pls[i].steam_name
                steamIdList[#steamIdList + 1] = pls[i].steam_id
                self.UI.setValue('steamMember'..tostring(#steamNameList), pls[i].steam_name)
                self.UI.setAttribute('steamMember'..tostring(#steamNameList), 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(#steamNameList), 'active', 'true')
            end
        end
    end

    Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', self)
    self.UI.setAttribute('step1', 'active', 'false')
    self.UI.setAttribute('step2', 'active', 'true')
end


function autoMove(params)
    local steamId = params.steamId
    local nextRoom = params.nextRoom
    local tkey
    if nextRoom == 1 then
        tkey = 'main'
    elseif nextRoom == 2 then
        tkey = 'private1'
    elseif nextRoom == 3 then
        tkey = 'private2'
    elseif nextRoom == 4 then
        tkey = 'private3'
    elseif nextRoom == 5 then
        tkey = 'private4'
    else
        return
    end
    autoMovePlayer(steamId, tkey)
end


--- 플레이어를 특정 채널로 이동
--- @param steamId   string  이동시킬 플레이어의 스팀 ID
--- @param targetKey string  "main" | "private1" | "private2" | "private3" | "private4"
function autoMovePlayer(steamId, targetKey)
    if switchToggle == 0 then return end
    local discordId = steamIdToDiscordId[steamId]
    if not discordId or steamIdToDiscordId[steamId] == nil then
        broadcastToAll("매칭되지 않은 플레이어입니다.", {r=1,g=0.5,b=0})
        return
    end

    local targetChannelId = sessionData.channels[targetKey]
    if not targetChannelId then
        broadcastToAll("알 수 없는 채널 키 : " .. targetKey, {r=1,g=0.5,b=0})
        return
    end

    postJSON("/move", {
        token             = HOST_TOKEN,
        steam_id          = steamId,
        discord_id        = discordId,
        target_channel_id = targetChannelId,
    }, function(data)
        -- 성공 시 별도 알림 없음 (필요하면 추가)
    end)
end

function onEndEdit(player, value, id)
    HOST_TOKEN = value
end

function setConsoleVisibility(pColor)
    if pColor == 'Grey' then return end
    if Player[pColor].steam_id == sessionData.hostSteamId then
        self.UI.setAttribute('step2', 'visibility', pColor)
    end
end

function onPlayerChangeColor(player_color)
    setConsoleVisibility(player_color)
end

function switch(player, value, id)
    if switchToggle == 0 then
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'color', '#55FF55')
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', '스위치:ON')
        switchToggle = 1
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'color', '#FF7777')
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', '스위치:OFF')
        switchToggle = 0
    end
end

function playerOfId(id)
    local pls = Player.getPlayers()
    for i = 1, #pls do
        if pls[i].steam_id == id then
            return pls[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function pickDiscordUsername(player, value, id)
    local idxStr = string.gsub(id, 'buttonMember', '')
    local idx = tonumber(idxStr)
    player.showOptionsDialog("디스코드 사용자명을 선택하세요", discordNameList, '',
    function (text, index, player_color)
        if text == '' then
            return
        else
            steamIdToDiscordId[steamIdList[idx]] = discordNameToId[text]
            self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. idx, 'text', text)
            Wait.frames(function ()
                testSameName()
            end, 50)
        end
    end
    )
end

function entrust(player, value, id)
    broadcastToAll('디스코드 사용자명을 각 플레이어가 스스로 매칭합니다.')
    for i = 1, #steamIdList do
        local pl = playerOfId(steamIdList[i])
        if pl ~= nil then
            pl.showOptionsDialog("디스코드 사용자명을 선택하세요", discordNameList, '',
                function(text, index, player_color)
                    if text == '' then
                        return
                    else
                        steamIdToDiscordId[steamIdList[i]] = discordNameToId[text]
                        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'text', text)
                        Wait.frames(function ()
                            testSameName()
                        end, 50)
                    end
                end
            )
        end
    end
end

function testSameName()
    for i = 1, 10 do
        local currentName = self.UI.getAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'text')
        if currentName ~= '사용자명 매칭' then
            self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'color', '#00FF00')
        end
    end
    for i = 1, 10 do
        local currentName = self.UI.getAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'text')
        if currentName ~= '사용자명 매칭' then
            for j = i + 1, 10 do
                local compareName = self.UI.getAttribute('buttonMember' .. j, 'text')
                if currentName == compareName then
                    self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'color', '#FF0000')
                    self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. j, 'color', '#FF0000')
                end
            end
        end
    end
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:

플레이어 매칭을 완료해 주세요.</Text>

<Text id="steamMember5" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="-140 30" fontSize="20" color="#FFFFFF"></Text>
<Button id="buttonMember5" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="140 30" fontSize="20" onClick="pickDiscordUsername">사용자명 매칭</Button>

<Text id="steamMember6" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="-140 -30" fontSize="20" color="#FFFFFF"></Text>
<Button id="buttonMember6" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="140 -30" fontSize="20" onClick="pickDiscordUsername">사용자명 매칭</Button>

<Text id="steamMember7" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="-140 -90" fontSize="20" color="#FFFFFF"></Text>
<Button id="buttonMember7" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="140 -90" fontSize="20" onClick="pickDiscordUsername">사용자명 매칭</Button>

<Text id="steamMember9" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="-140 -210" fontSize="20" color="#FFFFFF"></Text>

<Text id="steamMember10" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="-140 -270" fontSize="20" color="#FFFFFF"></Text>
<Button id="buttonMember10" width="280" height="40" offsetXY="140 -270" fontSize="20" onClick="pickDiscordUsername">사용자명 매칭</Button>

<Button width="140" height="40" offsetXY="-180 -330" fontSize="20" onClick="initialization">다시하기</Button>
<Button width="140" height="40" offsetXY="0 -330" fontSize="20" onClick="entrust">각자 매칭</Button>

</Panel>


</Panel>
